name: Darren
title: Co-President
bio: Hi all! I’m Darren (he/they), and I’m a 3rd year studying Computer Science (frown). I’m one of the co-presidents here, and I do all the boring stuff basically. In my free time I’m either daydreaming, wearing my headphones, or napping; and if I’m lucky, I’d be doing all three at once. I like Vocaloid music and Vivid Bad Squad! For games I do design, programming, and music/sound!

name: Luisa
title: Event Coordinator
bio: Hey! I’m Luisa (she/her) and I’m a junior transfer studying Media Studies here at Cal. I am one of your event coordinators and I look forward to meeting y’all. I have been studying game development & design at my local cc’s for the past couple years and have experience in Unreal & Maya! I love horror games, especially indie ones, & my favorite games are Ju-on the Grunge, Texas Chainsaw Massacre, & Halo Combat Evolved. If you ever want recommendations or want to recommend me anything, don’t be scared to!

name: Maddox
title: Event Coordinator
bio: Hello, I’m Maddox (he/him) and I study Environmental Science here at UC Berkeley. I’m also a freshman, but don’t tell anyone that. I’m one of the club’s event coordinators, meaning that I’m responsible for helping schedule and manage all the fun things that the club does. If the question of which games I like the best is ever begged, the undeniable GOATS are Pizza Tower, Plants vs Zombies, and Pizza Tower (again). I mostly just develop games - which is just a fancy way of saying that any programmers or artists willing to help me create a game would be appreciated (wink wink). Outside of games, I’m also a huge fan of risking being eaten by a bear while camping.

name: Alyn
title: Graphic Designer
bio: Helo helo, I’m Alyn (any) and I’m a 4th year studying Mechanical Engineering. I’m the graphic designer and historian for GDD. I like single player open world games like RDR2, Skyrim, etc, some platformers like Blasphemous, Hollow Knight, and I am also a Childe Tartaglia truther. On games I tend to take an artist role but am also trying to get better at the programming aspect. I also dabble in reading manhwas/mangas, listening to music, drawing, and 3D modeling

name: Pateel
title: Graphic Designer
bio: Hi everyone!!! My name is Pateel (she/her), I’m a 4th year studying Cognitive science and Computer science! It’s my first year on the board doing graphic design for GDD! Some of my favorite games are Omori, Final Fantasy (the whole franchise atp), and PJSK. Recently i’ve been playing Persona 3 Reload and Love and Deepspace! I work on games both as a programmer and artist, as I hope to go into the industry after graduation(jump scare🙁). Non gaming related; I love cats, cooking/baking, music(army, carat, moa, atiniy👁️) and animation+ comics + illustration :3 Can’t wait to meet you all at events this year!! :D

name: Laurier
title: Industry Outreach
bio: HELLO I’m Laurier (he/him). I’m studying Cognitive Science + Data Science. I’m the Industry outreach here at GDD, so let me know if there’s any speaker you would like to hear from and I’ll try to reach out to them! Some of the games I like are Halo Reach, Stardew, Ultrakill and Signalis. I do mostly programming for games and my art skills are very lacking, so I would love to meet artists passionate about games (feel free to reach out)!

name: Johnny
title: Webmaster
bio: Hi I’m Johnny(he/him)and I’m a junior senior in data science. I took the decal last semester as a programmer and it was a lot of fun, highly recommend. Also, I’m the webmaster lol. I play popular games like fortnite and valorant!

name: Kiran
title: Public Relations
bio: Yo I’m Kiran (he/him) and I’m a freshman studying Mechanical Engineering! I’m the public relations guy for the club, so I’ll be sending out most of the announcements and information and such. The games I have the most hours in are easily Minecraft and Terraria, but that’s not 100% fair because those games you never really “finish.” Some of my other favorites are Deltarune, Celeste, Inscryption, Outer Wilds, and Henry Stickmin (though I could list like 10 others that are all tied for my top 3). I do mostly programming but I’m trying to learn art and sound design. My first engine was GameMaker, so to any GameMaker fans I respect you.

name: Jackie Dai
title: Lead Facilitator & Mentor
quote: 'Theory is when you know everything but nothing works. Practice is when everything works but no one knows why. In [my head], theory and practice are combined: Nothing works and no one knows why.'
bio: I'm a 3rd year CS major leading the GDD decal this year. In addition to leading the decal, I'm also a mentor in the party system. In the little free time I have, I enjoy badminton, photography, and my electric skateboard. Here's my insta: @apple_oww

name: Joshua
title: Lead Facilitator
quote: If every porkchop were perfect, we wouldn't have hot dogs.
bio: Hello! I'm Josh, a sophomore studying EECS and a lead facilitator for the Game Design and Development Decal! Teaching is a great way for me to share the joys (and frustrations) of game development with other people, and I hope to meet you all through the club and Decal and lament about gacha games!

name: Shibo Jiang
title: Decal Facilitator
bio: Hey everyone! I'm Shibo, a senior studying CS. I took the game development decal last semester and had an absolute blast. It was so much fun, in fact, that I decided to come back and be a facilitator this time around! When I'm not diving into code, you can find me on my guitar or playing games like Apex Legends or Dead by Daylight. Overall, I look forward to meeting all the new decal students and I hope I can help make this a memorable experience as it was for me.

name: Darren Ting
title: Lead Mentor
quote: '...yet my arm continues to safeguard the porcelain cup.'
bio: Hi everyone! I'm Darren, I'm a sophomore studying Computer Science. I've always wanted to make games, and I hope to inspire others to share that passion. I hope that by joining the club you'll get to find a new interest (or grow your ability) in one of the many roles of game development! See you soon!

name: Sabrina Kuang
title: Decal Facilitator
quote: "Don't wish it were easier, wish you were better." – Chief, Animal Crossing.
bio: Hihi! I'm a 3rd year EECS major who likes to draw. If I'm not on my Stardew farm (Krobus ♥), you can probably catch me screaming on overcooked. PLEASE NO HADES 2 SPOILERS!!!

name: Viktor Mooren
title: Decal Facilitator
quote: "and the universe said I love you because you are love."
bio: Hi there! I'm a 3rd year studying Computer Science with a Philosophy minor. Originally from London, UK, I spend most of my days trying to come to grips with American customs such as Costco Hotdogs and "Wyoming". I can't wait to be teaching the Decal!
